title: Validation of a Mammalian Cell-Based Growth Assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2gsn5","text":"Evaluate performance of a competitive growth-based assay in HeLa cells with Bxb1 integration site using variants of interest compatible with Bxb1-site integration site generated by site-directed mutagenesis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bjn4s","text":"D-PBS: No calcium or magnesium ( ThermoFisher; 14190250)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fnigi","text":"DMEM: High glucose \u0026 pyruvate (Fisher; 11995073)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bsn8e","text":"TrypLE (Fisher; 12-604-013)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3g9eg","text":"Neon‱Transfection System (Fisher; MPK10096)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":4,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"dnh8j","text":"100mm Surface Treated Tissue Culture Dishes (Fisher; FB012924)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f8ll9","text":"HeLa Bxb1 Landing-Pad Cell Line (Roth Lab)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dtptl","text":"Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) ( Fisher; A5670701)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fir9","text":"Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL; Fisher; 15140163)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"29hcl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F0DBDBE9FACE11F094F90A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}}}}
steps: Culture reporter HeLa cell line in DMEM + 10% FBS + 1x Pen-Strep: Maintain healthy cells by passaging every 2-3 days Ideally, use cells that are not greater than 80% confluent on transfection day

Prepare cells for flow cytometry: 1. Expand the cells to a 10cm dish/variant to expand cells for flow cytometry. 2. After the expansion (~ day 5 post transfection), trypsinize, then inactivate with DMEM + 10% FBS + 1X 1X Pen-Strep, washing in PBS, and resuspend cells in BD FACS Pre-Sort buffer. 3. Aim for 2-5M/FACS tube through a filter cap.
Cell line maintenance 24 hours after transfection, replace media to DMEM + 10% FBS + 1X Pen-Strep.

Same day seeding and transfection: Trypsinize cells, then re-suspend in antibiotic-free media (DMEM + 10% FBS) and count. Resuspend 500k cells per 100ul buffer R with an equimolar amount of pCAG-NLS-coBxb1 and pDEST_HC_Rec_V2 totaling 20-25ug DNA Electroporate at least 500k cells and plate in a 10cm dish Perform the electroporation using Neon settings 1050Volts, 35ms pulse width, 2 pulses Use antibiotic-free media (DMEM + 10% FBS) 3. Transfect variants, including wild-type, negative controls, and mCherry+ only
Flow cytometry analysis: Run flow cytometer, using single-fluorescent controls for compensation. Select live, single cells, with mCherry+ expression and no BFP expression.

Post-FACs Isolation of Successful Integrants Culture HeLa cells in DMEM + 10% FBS + 1x Pen-Strep Maintain healthy cells by passaging every 2-3 days, splitting to a new 10cm dish when cells reach ~80% confluency During each passage, collect at least ~2million cells in an 1.5mL Eppendorf tube and flash freeze in liquid nitrogen Perform gDNA extraction and TileSeq on each passage/timepoint
creator: Warren van Loggerenberg
